info.title: AsasKit.Cli
info.description: CLI for AsasKit: scaffold app, brand names, pick DB provider, write env, run migrations.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: AsasKit CLI - The ultimate tool for Asas-based modular apps.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Clone, brand, configure and initialize a new AsasKit-based app

commands.name: install
commands.description: Install or update the AsasKit template from local or NuGet

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to the template folder or NuGet package name [default: .]
